mapper.sql: id, cts, uts, num_prefix, operator, num_type, num_code, num_province, num_city, status
mapper.select:
select from cc_phone_area
and num_prefix like concat('%', #{numPrefix}, '%')
order by id
mapper.insert: insert into cc_phone_area (id, cts, uts, num_prefix, operator, num_type, num_code, num_province, num_city, status) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cts,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{uts,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{numPrefix,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{numType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{numCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{numProvince,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{numCity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into cc_phone_area
id, cts, uts, num_prefix, operator, num_type, num_code, num_province, num_city, status,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cts,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{uts,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{numPrefix,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{numType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{numCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{numProvince,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{numCity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update: update cc_phone_area set cts = #{cts,jdbcType=BIGINT}, uts = #{uts,jdbcType=BIGINT}, num_prefix = #{numPrefix,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, operator = #{operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, num_type = #{numType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, num_code = #{numCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, num_province = #{numProvince,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, num_city = #{numCity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select count(1) from cc_phone_area
and num_prefix like concat('%', #{numPrefix}, '%')
